case_title: HENDRA SUYONO VS. NEO ROMAX, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUYONO, HENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT NEO ROMAX, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SAN FRANCISCO INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
